---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new field, mapping row, or example
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## What you want to add

Describe the proposed addition.

## Why

What use case does it serve? Which ISO 19115 element or FAO platform
concern does it address? Has the equivalent already been covered by
an existing community extension (link please)?

## Proposed shape

If you have a draft schema fragment or example, paste it here.

## Profile tier

For ISO mapping additions: would this be MANDATORY, Needed, or
Optional in the FAO ISO 19115-1 profile?
